tasks.label: Copy Integration to custom_components
tasks.command: sudo rm -rf /mnt/supervisor/homeassistant/custom_components/atlas_scientific_pool && sudo mkdir -p /mnt/supervisor/homeassistant/custom_components/atlas_scientific_pool && sudo cp -r /addons/Atlas-Scientific-Pool-Automation/custom_components/atlas_scientific_pool/. /mnt/supervisor/homeassistant/custom_components/atlas_scientific_pool/ && echo 'Copied integration to /mnt/supervisor/homeassistant/custom_components/atlas_scientific_pool'

tasks.label: Restart HA Core
tasks.command: ha core restart && echo 'HA Core Restarted'
